positive: Minimalist and maximalist tropical jungle botanicals arrangement, featuring stylized silhouettes of various leaves (Monstera, palm fronds, banana leaves) and exotic flowers (hibiscus, orchids). The arrangement should form a cohesive, circular wreath design centered on a clean, ivory background. Use a high-contrast, two-tone palette of deep emerald green and creamy burnt orange against the pale background. The style should be modern linocut woodblock print meets elegant botanical illustration. Composition must be symmetrical, with clear outlines for easy print transfer. Flat vector graphic style, graphic novel aesthetic, negative space utilization is key. --ar 1:1 --v 6.0
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, graffiti, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, realism, busy, grunge
